# Port target: `eslint-plugin-react-hooks`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/facebook/react |
| Submodule | `upstream/react` @ `eslint-plugin-react-hooks@7.1.1` (`packages/eslint-plugin-react-hooks`) |
| Baseline npm version | `7.1.1` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | none — port target |
| Rules to port | 29 |

> React Hooks v7 exposes React Compiler lint categories in addition to the classic hooks rules.

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description | Docs |
|---|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | `capitalized-calls` | Validates against calling capitalized functions/methods instead of using JSX | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/capitalized-calls) |
| 2 | `component-hook-factories` | Deprecated: this rule has been removed in 7.1.0. | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/component-hook-factories) |
| 3 | `config` | Validates the compiler configuration options | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/config) |
| 4 | `error-boundaries` | Validates usage of error boundaries instead of try/catch for errors in child components | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/error-boundaries) |
| 5 | `exhaustive-deps` | verifies the list of dependencies for Hooks like useEffect and similar | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/exhaustive-deps) |
| 6 | `exhaustive-effect-dependencies` | Validates that effect dependencies are exhaustive and without extraneous values | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/exhaustive-effect-dependencies) |
| 7 | `fbt` | Validates usage of fbt | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/fbt) |
| 8 | `gating` | Validates configuration of [gating mode](https://react.dev/reference/react-compiler/gating) | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/gating) |
| 9 | `globals` | Validates against assignment/mutation of globals during render, part of ensuring that [side effects must render outside of render](https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#side-effects-must-run-outside-of-render) | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/globals) |
| 10 | `hooks` | Validates the rules of hooks | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/hooks) |
| 11 | `immutability` | Validates against mutating props, state, and other values that [are immutable](https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#props-and-state-are-immutable) | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/immutability) |
| 12 | `incompatible-library` | Validates against usage of libraries which are incompatible with memoization (manual or automatic) | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/incompatible-library) |
| 13 | `invariant` | Internal invariants | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/invariant) |
| 14 | `memo-dependencies` | Validates that useMemo() and useCallback() specify comprehensive dependencies without extraneous values. See [`useMemo()` docs](https://react.dev/reference/react/useMemo) for more information. | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/memo-dependencies) |
| 15 | `memoized-effect-dependencies` | Validates that effect dependencies are memoized | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/memoized-effect-dependencies) |
| 16 | `no-deriving-state-in-effects` | Validates against deriving values from state in an effect | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/no-deriving-state-in-effects) |
| 17 | `preserve-manual-memoization` | Validates that existing manual memoized is preserved by the compiler. React Compiler will only compile components and hooks if its inference [matches or exceeds the existing manual memoization](https://react.dev/learn/react-compiler/introduction#what-should-i-do-about-usememo-usecallback-and-reactmemo) | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/preserve-manual-memoization) |
| 18 | `purity` | Validates that [components/hooks are pure](https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure) by checking that they do not call known-impure functions | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/purity) |
| 19 | `refs` | Validates correct usage of refs, not reading/writing during render. See the "pitfalls" section in [`useRef()` usage](https://react.dev/reference/react/useRef#usage) | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/refs) |
| 20 | `rule-suppression` | Validates against suppression of other rules | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/rule-suppression) |
| 21 | `rules-of-hooks` | enforces the Rules of Hooks | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/rules-of-hooks) |
| 22 | `set-state-in-effect` | Validates against calling setState synchronously in an effect. This can indicate non-local derived data, a derived event pattern, or improper external data synchronization. | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/set-state-in-effect) |
| 23 | `set-state-in-render` | Validates against setting state during render, which can trigger additional renders and potential infinite render loops | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/set-state-in-render) |
| 24 | `static-components` | Validates that components are static, not recreated every render. Components that are recreated dynamically can reset state and trigger excessive re-rendering | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/static-components) |
| 25 | `syntax` | Validates against invalid syntax | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/syntax) |
| 26 | `todo` | Unimplemented features | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/todo) |
| 27 | `unsupported-syntax` | Validates against syntax that we do not plan to support in React Compiler | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/unsupported-syntax) |
| 28 | `use-memo` | Validates usage of the useMemo() hook against common mistakes. See [`useMemo()` docs](https://react.dev/reference/react/useMemo) for more information. | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/use-memo) |
| 29 | `void-use-memo` | Validates that useMemos always return a value and that the result of the useMemo is used by the component/hook. See [`useMemo()` docs](https://react.dev/reference/react/useMemo) for more information. | [docs](https://react.dev/reference/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/lints/void-use-memo) |
